selected_issue.issue: Missing contract diagnostics fields required for replay diagnosis
selected_issue.title: contract_diagnostics lacked rail/p-hat/timer state fields needed by Bible diagnostics contract

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues: canonical tests passed, replay assessment had no structural/behavioral/invariant violations, and no replay mismatch signal was present. The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 (missing instrumentation): contract_diagnostics payloads omitted key rail/p-hat/timer state fields needed for diagnosis.

checks.command: contract diagnostics key probe on tools/fixtures/raw_replay_sample.jsonl

files_changed.change: Extended contract diagnostics payload with rail/p-hat/timer state fields.
Passed frame timer state into contract diagnostics computation.
Updated diagnostics unit tests and added core-field assertions.
Added resolve-path assertions for emitted contract diagnostics fields.
Added human-readable report for this run.
Added machine-readable report artifact for this run.

validation_performed.command: contract diagnostics key probe on tools/fixtures/raw_replay_sample.jsonl

before_after_evidence.before: contract_diagnostics lacked explicit rail/p-hat/timer fields; probe reported missing keys rail_low, rail_high, p_hat_prev, p_hat_final, round_time_remaining_s, is_bomb_planted.
before_after_evidence.after: contract_diagnostics now includes rail/p-hat/timer fields; probe reports no missing keys and canonical tests/replay assessment stay green.

unresolved_risks: Replay fixture coverage for planted-bomb countdown semantics is still limited.
Replay summary script does not yet emit per-point diagnostics completeness metrics.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation issue fixed and validated with minimal changes; additional analytics expansion would exceed bounded single-issue scope.
